performance_overview: Through 44 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull holds 6 open positions (SCHW, PCG, XLU, CMG, GIS, META). Account equity ~$100,692 (+0.69% since $100K inception) vs SPY -0.59% cumulative — Bull leads the benchmark by ~1.28pts. Today (Jul 15 EOD) was a quiet no-exit day: net -$25.02 (-0.02%) vs SPY +0.27%, a modest -0.30% single-day drag. Unrealized book is healthy: SCHW +5.29% (anchor), META +2.83% (Day 1), GIS +2.44% (Day 2), PCG +1.97%; only CMG (-0.34%, blackout) and XLU (-0.92%, laggard) are red.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket for the LEGACY intraday RSI strategy; n=2, thin sample, informational only now that the strategy is MA-20/60 trend-following. Do not act on it without n>=10.
avoid: Shallow EMA cross entries on earnings-adjacent names: TSLA (Jul 7 entry, 0.06% cross spread, earnings Jul 22) lost -4.78% on exit. Rule: SKIP (do not size down) when BOTH shallow cross spread (<0.5%) AND earnings within 14 days apply simultaneously. This is the live rule under the current trend strategy.

Very shallow golden crosses (<0.1% EMA-20/60 spread): NVDA (0.07%) skipped Jul 15 as a near-clone of the failed TSLA pattern (0.06%). Treat sub-0.1% crosses as noise-level, high reversal risk — skip on sight.

LEGACY intraday RSI buckets (informational, strategy retired): RSI 60-65 0/3, RSI 65-75 0/1, gap-up opens with RSI>60 — all losers historically. Retained only as a record of why the intraday RSI approach was abandoned in favor of trend-following.
recent_market_context: Jul 7-15: MA-20/60 trend strategy running steadily; 6 positions held, book net positive on unrealized. VIX 16.50 (CBOE, low/calm). SPY tracking real again via Alpaca (yfinance fix Jul 14). Market broadly constructive/low-vol; trends holding, no death crosses triggered recently. INFRA UPDATE (Jul 15 evening scan): check_earnings.py ran CLEANLY — 0 date-query errors out of 15 lookups, correctly flagged PYPL (earnings Jul 28). The prior yfinance-TLS block from this cloud IP appears RESOLVED; earnings risk is verifiable again at the script level.
